verification_notes.note: Wave 18 added official BMW MY2018 technical-data evidence that the F80 M3 manual and M-DCT top-gear values in production were inaccurate. The official sheet lists 6-speed manual VI gear 0.846 and 7-speed M-DCT VII gear 0.671, so the row now promotes those exact top-gear values and full forward gear-ratio sets while keeping the drivetrain scope unchanged.
Legacy variant-source research previously recorded this variant as BMW press release with High confidence.

unresolved.reason: Wave 18 evidence is from official BMW MY2018 US technical data; this pass did not recover a parallel ACEA sheet proving no year or market calibration drift for every F80 state.

verification_notes.note: Wave 18 added official BMW MY2018 technical-data evidence that the F80 M3 manual and M-DCT top-gear values in production were inaccurate. This follow-up adds official BMW 03/2014 launch-period and 01/2018 Portugal evidence that the F80 M3 DCT final drive is 3.462, correcting the inherited 3.154 carryover while keeping the broader row scope unchanged.
Legacy variant-source research previously recorded this variant as BMW press release with High confidence.

unresolved.item: BMW M3 (F80) exact continuity across the represented 2014-2018 row span
unresolved.reason: The checked official BMW 03/2014 launch-period and 01/2018 Portugal technical-data PDFs agree on the core M3 transmission and final-drive package, but this pass did not recover a complete official year-by-year chain for every intermediate model year in the row.

unresolved.item: BMW M3 exact standard-versus-optional tyre package semantics
unresolved.reason: The checked official BMW 03/2014 launch-period technical-data PDF shows the base M3 standard package as staggered 255/40 ZR18 front plus 275/40 ZR18 rear, but this pass did not retune the row's existing default-versus-option tyre ordering.

verification_notes.note: This research wave narrows the F80 M3 Competition manual row to 2016-2018. Official BMW Competition Package launch material states that the Competition Package becomes available from spring 2016, and the paired Competition technical-data PDF confirms the manual top gear 0.846 and final drive 3.462 for the exact Competition state.
Legacy variant-source research previously recorded this variant as BMW press release with High confidence.

unresolved.item: BMW M3 Competition exact standard-versus-optional tyre package semantics
